---
title: "Systematic Correction Metrics and Baseline Comparisons"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
library(tidyverse)
library(depmixS4)
library(clue)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
})
```

```{r}
params <- list(
dt = 0.02, T = 20, seed = 11L,
tau_cmd = 0.15, cmd_proc_std = 0.005,
m = 1.0, c = 0.4, k = 4.0, plant_proc_std = 0.04,
tau_sa = 0.08, sa_meas_std = 0.03, sa_bias = 0.0,
tau_sb = 0.25, sb_meas_std = 0.02, sb_bias = 0.01,
alpha = 0.6, w1 = 1.0, w2 = 0.2,
train_frac = 0.5, na_cmd = 1L, nb_cmd = 1L,
na_plant = 2L, nb_plant = 2L,
na_sens = 1L, nb_sens = 1L, K = 4
)

schedule <- tibble::tribble(
~regime, ~t_start, ~t_end,
"Nominal",      0.0,     5.0,
"SensorNoisy",  5.0,    10.0,
"DynamicsOff", 10.0,    14.5,
"Drift",       14.5,    params$T
)

regime_order <- c("Nominal", "SensorNoisy", "DynamicsOff", "Drift")
ch_names <- c("e0","e1","e2a","e2b","e3","e4")
lab_map <- c(e0="M0 (Actuator)", e1="M1 (Plant)", e2a="M2a (Sensor A)",
             e2b="M2b (Sensor B)", e3="M3 (Fusion)", e4="M4 (KPI)")
```

```{r}
make_u_cmd <- function(n, amp = 1.0, dt = 0.02) {
t <- (0:(n-1)) * dt
u <- 0.6 * sin(2*pi*0.25*t) + 0.4 * sign(sin(2*pi*0.05*t))
step_every <- as.integer(2.5/dt)
for (i in seq(1, n, by = step_every)) u[i:n] <- u[i:n] + 0.2 * rnorm(1)
amp * u
}

lpf_first_order <- function(u, tau, dt, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); y <- numeric(n)
a <- exp(-dt / max(tau, 1e-6))
for (k in 2:n) y[k] <- a*y[k-1] + (1 - a)*u[k-1] + proc_std*rnorm(1)
y
}

plant_msd <- function(u, dt, m, c, k, proc_std = 0.0) {
n <- length(u); x <- numeric(n); v <- numeric(n)
for (kk in 2:n) {
  acc <- (u[kk-1] - c*v[kk-1] - k*x[kk-1]) / m + proc_std*rnorm(1)
  v[kk] <- v[kk-1] + dt*acc
  x[kk] <- x[kk-1] + dt*v[kk-1]
}
list(pos = x, vel = v)
}

sensor_first_order <- function(xpos, dt, tau, meas_std = 0.0, bias = 0.0) {
y <- lpf_first_order(xpos, tau, dt, 0)
y + bias + rnorm(length(y), sd = meas_std)
}

fit_arx <- function(y, u, na, nb) {
kmax <- length(y); p <- max(na, nb)
rows <- vector("list", kmax - p); Tvec <- numeric(kmax - p)
for (k in (p+1):kmax) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) y[k-i]), sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  rows[[k - p]] <- phi; Tvec[k - p] <- y[k]
}
Phi <- do.call(rbind, rows)
theta <- as.numeric(solve(t(Phi) %*% Phi, t(Phi) %*% Tvec))
list(theta = theta, na = na, nb = nb)
}

sim_arx <- function(u, y_seed, model) {
na <- model$na; nb <- model$nb; theta <- model$theta
n <- length(u); yhat <- numeric(n)
yhat[1:na] <- tail(y_seed, na)
p <- max(na, nb)
for (k in (p+1):n) {
  phi <- c(sapply(1:na, function(i) yhat[k-i]), sapply(1:nb, function(j) u[k-j]))
  yhat[k] <- sum(theta * phi)
}
yhat
}

ema_smooth <- function(x, a) {
out <- numeric(length(x)); out[1] <- x[1]
for (i in 2:length(x)) out[i] <- a * x[i] + (1 - a) * out[i - 1]
out
}

rate_limit <- function(x, max_step) {
out <- numeric(length(x)); out[1] <- x[1]
for (i in 2:length(x)) {
  step <- x[i] - out[i - 1]
  step <- pmin(pmax(step, -max_step), max_step)
  out[i] <- out[i - 1] + step
}
out
}

rmse <- function(x) sqrt(mean(x^2))
mae <- function(x) mean(abs(x))
```

```{r}
set.seed(params$seed)
n <- as.integer(params$T / params$dt)
t <- (0:(n-1)) * params$dt
u_cmd <- make_u_cmd(n, dt = params$dt)

u_act_P <- lpf_first_order(u_cmd, params$tau_cmd, params$dt, params$cmd_proc_std)
pl <- plant_msd(u_act_P, params$dt, params$m, params$c, params$k, params$plant_proc_std)
x_pos_P <- pl$pos; x_vel_P <- pl$vel
yA_P <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sa, params$sa_meas_std, params$sa_bias)
yB_P <- sensor_first_order(x_pos_P, params$dt, params$tau_sb, params$sb_meas_std, params$sb_bias)
y_fused_P <- params$alpha * yA_P + (1 - params$alpha) * yB_P
z_P <- params$w1 * x_pos_P + params$w2 * x_vel_P

split <- as.integer(params$train_frac * n)
arx_cmd   <- fit_arx(u_act_P[1:split], u_cmd[1:split], params$na_cmd, params$nb_cmd)
arx_plant <- fit_arx(x_pos_P[1:split], u_act_P[1:split], params$na_plant, params$nb_plant)
arx_sa    <- fit_arx(yA_P[1:split], x_pos_P[1:split], params$na_sens, params$nb_sens)
arx_sb    <- fit_arx(yB_P[1:split], x_pos_P[1:split], params$na_sens, params$nb_sens)

u_act_A <- sim_arx(u_cmd, y_seed = u_act_P[1:params$na_cmd], arx_cmd)
xpos_A  <- sim_arx(u_act_A, y_seed = x_pos_P[1:params$na_plant], arx_plant)
xvel_A  <- c(0, diff(xpos_A) / params$dt)
yA_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yA_P[1:params$na_sens], arx_sa)
yB_A    <- sim_arx(xpos_A, y_seed = yB_P[1:params$na_sens], arx_sb)
y_fused_A <- params$alpha * yA_A + (1 - params$alpha) * yB_A
z_A <- params$w1 * xpos_A + params$w2 * xvel_A

regime_by_t <- rep("Nominal", n)
for (r in seq_len(nrow(schedule))) {
  idx <- which(t >= schedule$t_start[r] & t < schedule$t_end[r])
  regime_by_t[idx] <- schedule$regime[r]
}

x_pos_A_fault <- xpos_A; yA_A_fault <- yA_A; yB_A_fault <- yB_A
for (k_i in seq_len(n)) {
  reg <- regime_by_t[k_i]
  if (reg == "SensorNoisy") {
    yA_A_fault[k_i] <- yA_A_fault[k_i] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.06)
    yB_A_fault[k_i] <- yB_A_fault[k_i] + rnorm(1, 0, 0.05)
  } else if (reg == "DynamicsOff") {
    x_pos_A_fault[k_i] <- 0.8 * x_pos_A_fault[k_i]
  } else if (reg == "Drift") {
    yA_A_fault[k_i] <- yA_A_fault[k_i] + 0.0007 * (k_i - 1)
  }
}
y_fused_A_fault <- params$alpha * yA_A_fault + (1 - params$alpha) * yB_A_fault
z_A_fault <- params$w1 * x_pos_A_fault + params$w2 * c(0, diff(x_pos_A_fault) / params$dt)

E <- tibble::tibble(t = t,
  e0 = u_act_A - u_act_P, e1 = x_pos_A_fault - x_pos_P,
  e2a = yA_A_fault - yA_P, e2b = yB_A_fault - yB_P,
  e3 = y_fused_A_fault - y_fused_P, e4 = z_A_fault - z_P)

gt <- tibble::tibble(t = t, regime = regime_by_t)
```

```{r}
feat <- E %>%
dplyr::transmute(t,
  e0 = e0, e1 = e1, e2a = e2a, e2b = e2b, e3 = e3, e4 = e4,
  e_abs_sum = abs(e0)+abs(e1)+abs(e2a)+abs(e2b)+abs(e3)+abs(e4),
  e_rms = sqrt((e0^2+e1^2+e2a^2+e2b^2+e3^2+e4^2)/6),
  e1_diff = c(0, diff(e1)), e3_diff = c(0, diff(e3))
) %>%
dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-t, ~ as.numeric(scale(.x))))

Ez <- feat %>% dplyr::select(-t) %>% as.data.frame()
fams <- rep(list(gaussian()), ncol(Ez))

best_ll <- -Inf; best_fm <- NULL
for (r in 1:10) {
  mod <- depmix(response = lapply(names(Ez), function(nm) as.formula(paste0(nm, "~ 1"))),
                data = Ez, nstates = params$K, family = fams)
  fm_try <- tryCatch(fit(mod, verbose = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(fm_try) && logLik(fm_try) > best_ll) {
    best_ll <- logLik(fm_try); best_fm <- fm_try
  }
}
fm <- best_fm

gamma_df <- posterior(fm)
K <- params$K
vpath <- gamma_df$state
```

## 1. HMM Posterior-Weighted Correction (proposed method)

```{r}
mu_state <- tibble::tibble(state = 1:K)
for (ch in ch_names) {
  mu_state[[ch]] <- sapply(1:K, function(k_s) {
    gamma_k <- gamma_df[[paste0("S", k_s)]]
    if (sum(gamma_k) < 1e-12) return(0)
    sum(gamma_k * E[[ch]]) / sum(gamma_k)
  })
}

bias_z_from_gamma <- function(mu_k_vec, gamma_df, K) {
  b <- numeric(nrow(gamma_df))
  for (k_s in 1:K) b <- b + gamma_df[[paste0("S", k_s)]] * mu_k_vec[k_s]
  b
}

CFG <- list(kappa = 0.8, ema_alpha = 0.15, r_max = 0.05)

bias_z <- lapply(ch_names, function(nm) bias_z_from_gamma(mu_state[[nm]], gamma_df, K))
names(bias_z) <- ch_names

bias_corr_hmm <- lapply(ch_names, function(nm) {
  b <- CFG$kappa * bias_z[[nm]]
  b <- ema_smooth(b, CFG$ema_alpha)
  rate_limit(b, CFG$r_max)
})
names(bias_corr_hmm) <- ch_names

apply_correction <- function(bias_corr) {
  u_act_C <- u_act_A - bias_corr$e0
  xpos_C  <- xpos_A  - bias_corr$e1
  xvel_C  <- c(0, diff(xpos_C) / params$dt)
  yA_C    <- yA_A    - bias_corr$e2a
  yB_C    <- yB_A    - bias_corr$e2b
  y_fused_C <- params$alpha * yA_C + (1 - params$alpha) * yB_C
  z_C       <- params$w1 * xpos_C + params$w2 * xvel_C
  tibble::tibble(t = t,
    e0 = u_act_C - u_act_P, e1 = xpos_C - x_pos_P,
    e2a = yA_C - yA_P, e2b = yB_C - yB_P,
    e3 = y_fused_C - y_fused_P, e4 = z_C - z_P)
}

E_hmm <- apply_correction(bias_corr_hmm)
```

## 2. Baseline Corrections

```{r}
bias_global <- lapply(ch_names, function(nm) rep(mean(E[[nm]]), n))
names(bias_global) <- ch_names
E_global <- apply_correction(bias_global)

viterbi_means <- lapply(ch_names, function(nm) {
  state_means <- sapply(1:K, function(k_s) {
    idx <- which(vpath == k_s)
    if (length(idx) == 0) return(0)
    mean(E[[nm]][idx])
  })
  state_means[vpath]
})
names(viterbi_means) <- ch_names
E_viterbi <- apply_correction(viterbi_means)

win <- 51
bias_rolling <- lapply(ch_names, function(nm) {
  x <- E[[nm]]
  out <- numeric(n)
  for (i in 1:n) {
    lo <- max(1, i - win %/% 2)
    hi <- min(n, i + win %/% 2)
    out[i] <- mean(x[lo:hi])
  }
  out
})
names(bias_rolling) <- ch_names
E_rolling <- apply_correction(bias_rolling)
```

## 3. Overall RMSE Across All Modules

```{r}
compute_all_metrics <- function(E_corr, method_name) {
  tibble::tibble(
    Method = method_name,
    Module = lab_map[ch_names],
    Channel = ch_names,
    RMSE_orig = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) rmse(E[[nm]])),
    RMSE_corr = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) rmse(E_corr[[nm]])),
    MAE_orig = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) mae(E[[nm]])),
    MAE_corr = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) mae(E_corr[[nm]]))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dRMSE_pct = 100 * (RMSE_orig - RMSE_corr) / RMSE_orig,
    dMAE_pct = 100 * (MAE_orig - MAE_corr) / MAE_orig
  )
}

all_metrics <- bind_rows(
  compute_all_metrics(E_hmm, "HMM Posterior (proposed)"),
  compute_all_metrics(E_global, "Global Mean"),
  compute_all_metrics(E_viterbi, "Viterbi Hard"),
  compute_all_metrics(E_rolling, "Rolling Mean (w=51)")
)

cat("=== RMSE Reduction (%) by Method and Module ===\n\n")
all_metrics %>%
  dplyr::select(Method, Module, dRMSE_pct) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Method, values_from = dRMSE_pct) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 1))) %>%
  kable(format = "pipe")
```

```{r}
cat("\n=== MAE Reduction (%) by Method and Module ===\n\n")
all_metrics %>%
  dplyr::select(Method, Module, dMAE_pct) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Method, values_from = dMAE_pct) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 1))) %>%
  kable(format = "pipe")
```

## 4. Per-Regime RMSE Breakdown (Proposed Method)

```{r}
regime_metrics <- list()
for (reg in regime_order) {
  idx <- which(gt$regime == reg)
  row <- tibble::tibble(
    Regime = reg,
    Module = lab_map[ch_names],
    Channel = ch_names,
    RMSE_orig = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) rmse(E[[nm]][idx])),
    RMSE_hmm  = sapply(ch_names, function(nm) rmse(E_hmm[[nm]][idx])),
    dRMSE_pct = 100 * (RMSE_orig - RMSE_hmm) / RMSE_orig
  )
  regime_metrics[[reg]] <- row
}

regime_tbl <- bind_rows(regime_metrics)

cat("=== Per-Regime RMSE Reduction (%) with HMM Correction ===\n\n")
regime_tbl %>%
  dplyr::select(Regime, Module, dRMSE_pct) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Regime, values_from = dRMSE_pct) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 1))) %>%
  kable(format = "pipe")
```

## 5. Per-Regime Comparison Across All Methods

```{r}
regime_method_metrics <- list()
methods_list <- list(
  "HMM Posterior (proposed)" = E_hmm,
  "Global Mean" = E_global,
  "Viterbi Hard" = E_viterbi,
  "Rolling Mean (w=51)" = E_rolling
)

for (reg in regime_order) {
  idx <- which(gt$regime == reg)
  for (mname in names(methods_list)) {
    Ec <- methods_list[[mname]]
    agg_orig <- sqrt(mean(rowSums(as.matrix(E[idx, ch_names])^2)))
    agg_corr <- sqrt(mean(rowSums(as.matrix(Ec[idx, ch_names])^2)))
    regime_method_metrics[[paste(reg, mname)]] <- tibble::tibble(
      Regime = reg, Method = mname,
      Aggregate_RMSE_orig = agg_orig,
      Aggregate_RMSE_corr = agg_corr,
      dRMSE_pct = 100 * (agg_orig - agg_corr) / agg_orig
    )
  }
}

regime_method_tbl <- bind_rows(regime_method_metrics)

cat("=== Aggregate RMSE Reduction (%) by Regime and Method ===\n\n")
regime_method_tbl %>%
  dplyr::select(Regime, Method, dRMSE_pct) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Method, values_from = dRMSE_pct) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 1))) %>%
  kable(format = "pipe")
```

## 6. Visualizations

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
summary_plot <- all_metrics %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Module = factor(Module, levels = lab_map),
                Method = factor(Method, levels = c("HMM Posterior (proposed)",
                  "Viterbi Hard", "Rolling Mean (w=51)", "Global Mean")))

ggplot(summary_plot, aes(x = Module, y = dRMSE_pct, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "HMM Posterior (proposed)" = "#2d5a7b",
    "Viterbi Hard" = "#547792",
    "Rolling Mean (w=51)" = "#89a8b8",
    "Global Mean" = "#b5c9d5")) +
  labs(title = "RMSE Reduction by Module and Correction Method",
       x = "", y = "RMSE Reduction (%)", fill = "Method") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1), legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
regime_method_tbl2 <- regime_method_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Regime = factor(Regime, levels = regime_order),
    Method = factor(Method, levels = c("HMM Posterior (proposed)",
      "Viterbi Hard", "Rolling Mean (w=51)", "Global Mean")))

ggplot(regime_method_tbl2, aes(x = Regime, y = dRMSE_pct, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "HMM Posterior (proposed)" = "#2d5a7b",
    "Viterbi Hard" = "#547792",
    "Rolling Mean (w=51)" = "#89a8b8",
    "Global Mean" = "#b5c9d5")) +
  labs(title = "Aggregate RMSE Reduction by Regime and Method",
       x = "Regime", y = "Aggregate RMSE Reduction (%)", fill = "Method") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
regime_mod_plot <- regime_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Module = factor(Module, levels = lab_map),
    Regime = factor(Regime, levels = regime_order))

ggplot(regime_mod_plot, aes(x = Module, y = dRMSE_pct, fill = Regime)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('Nominal' = 'darkgreen', 'SensorNoisy' = 'darkorange',
                                'DynamicsOff' = 'darkred', 'Drift' = 'navy')) +
  labs(title = "Per-Regime RMSE Reduction by Module (HMM Posterior Correction)",
       x = "", y = "RMSE Reduction (%)", fill = "Regime") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1), legend.position = "bottom")
```

## 7. Summary

```{r}
cat("=== Overall Summary (mean RMSE reduction across all modules) ===\n\n")
all_metrics %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Method) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Mean_dRMSE_pct = round(mean(dRMSE_pct), 1),
    Min_dRMSE_pct = round(min(dRMSE_pct), 1),
    Max_dRMSE_pct = round(max(dRMSE_pct), 1),
    Mean_dMAE_pct = round(mean(dMAE_pct), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  kable(format = "pipe")
```
